texto: Dictators have no peers; only sycophants to do their bidding. That is how it was in Nazi Germany. And so it is wherever autocrats rule in government or in business. Dictators and braggarts cause their own demise, because when they finally are in extremis, they have only their lackeys to call on, while their adversaries attract the best of men.
explicacao: Citação de Richard W. Sonnenfeldt sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Dictators have no peers; only sycophants to do their bidding. That is how it was in Nazi Germany.…” articula reflexao, history, dictators em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
